name: find
description: Walk a file hierarchy and evaluate expressions

name: -name
options.description: Match filename against shell pattern (case-sensitive)

name: -iname
options.description: Match filename against shell pattern (case-insensitive)

name: -type
options.description: Match file type (f=file, d=dir, l=symlink, b/c/p/s)

name: -size
options.description: Match file size (+/-N with suffix c/k/M/G)

name: -mtime
options.description: Match files modified N*24 hours ago (+N/-N/N)

name: -atime
options.description: Match files accessed N*24 hours ago (+N/-N/N)

name: -ctime
options.description: Match files changed N*24 hours ago (+N/-N/N)

name: -mmin
options.description: Match files modified N minutes ago

name: -amin
options.description: Match files accessed N minutes ago

name: -cmin
options.description: Match files changed N minutes ago

name: -newer
options.description: Match files modified more recently than FILE

name: -exec
options.description: Execute command on each matched file (terminate with \;)

name: -execdir
options.description: Like -exec but run command from file's directory

name: -ok
options.description: Like -exec but ask user for confirmation first

name: -print
options.description: Print the full file name followed by a newline

name: -print0
options.description: Print the full file name followed by a null character

name: -printf
options.description: Print format string for each matched file

name: -delete
options.description: Delete matched files

name: -maxdepth
options.description: Descend at most N levels of directories below the starting point

name: -mindepth
options.description: Do not apply tests or actions at levels less than N

name: -perm
options.description: Match file permission bits

name: -user
options.description: Match files owned by user name or ID

name: -group
options.description: Match files owned by group name or ID

name: -empty
options.description: Match empty files and directories

name: -path
options.description: Match full path against shell pattern

name: -ipath
options.description: Match full path against pattern (case-insensitive)

name: -regex
options.description: Match full path against regular expression

name: -iregex
options.description: Match full path against regex (case-insensitive)

name: -not
options.description: Negate the following expression

name: -and
-a
options.description: Logical AND of expressions (implicit between tests)

name: -or
-o
options.description: Logical OR of expressions

name: -prune
options.description: Do not descend into the current directory

name: -ls
options.description: List matched files in ls -dils format

name: -depth
options.description: Process directory contents before the directory itself

name: -follow
-L
options.description: Follow symbolic links

name: -xdev
options.description: Do not descend into directories on other filesystems

name: -mount
options.description: Do not descend into directories on other filesystems (same as -xdev)

name: -readable
options.description: Match files which are readable

name: -writable
options.description: Match files which are writable

name: -executable
options.description: Match files which are executable

name: -samefile
options.description: Match files that refer to the same inode as FILE

name: -links
options.description: Match files with N hard links

name: -inum
options.description: Match files with inode number N

name: -regextype
options.description: Set regular expression syntax (emacs, posix-awk, etc.)

name: -fprint
options.description: Print full file names to FILE

name: -fprint0
options.description: Print full file names to FILE, null-separated

name: -quit
options.description: Exit immediately (no further processing)
